entities.name: BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of life in a particular habitat or ecosystem supporting food production

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of food in a way that is environmentally sustainable and secure for the future

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: Increasing food production while reducing environmental impact

entities.name: ANNUAL CROPS
entities.description: Crops that complete their life cycle in one growing season

entities.name: ANIMAL POLLINATORS
entities.description: Animals that transfer pollen between plants to facilitate reproduction

entities.name: TREES
entities.description: Perennial plants with a woody stem

entities.name: MICRO-ORGANISMS
entities.description: Microscopic organisms that can have beneficial interactions with crops

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals raised in an agricultural setting for food or other products

entities.name: AQUATIC ANIMALS
entities.description: Animals living in water, used in aquaculture production

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of producing offspring with desired traits to improve crop or livestock performance

entities.name: PERENNIAL LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes that live for more than two years and can be integrated into farmland

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PRACTICES
entities.description: Management practices used in crop production to support beneficial interactions

entities.name: MANURE INCORPORATION
entities.description: The process of adding manure to the soil to improve fertility

entities.name: MULTI-TROPHIC PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Aquatic production systems involving multiple trophic levels

entities.name: RESOURCE USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of a crop to use resources like water and nutrients effectively

entities.name: ADAPTATION TO CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The ability of a crop or animal to survive and produce under changing climate conditions

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shift in temperatures and weather patterns affecting food production

entities.name: LONGITUDINAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Research method involving repeated observations of food sectors over time

entities.name: META-ANALYSES
entities.description: Statistical analysis that combines results of multiple studies to provide an evidence base

entities.name: SYNTHETIC REVIEWS
entities.description: Reviews that synthesize findings from various sources to provide an evidence base

entities.name: CASE STUDIES
entities.description: Detailed study of a specific subject or instance to provide evidence for interventions
